chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-426 of 2017. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For orders of office objection at flag.A. For Katcha Peshi. 16.06.2017. Mr. Muhammad Ashique Dhamrah Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Ali Akbar Kalhoro State Counsel a/w SIP Ghulam Mustafa Abro, SHO PS Gaheja District Shikarpur and SIP Abdul Haleem on behalf of SSP, Shikarpur. ---------------- It is, inter alia, contended by the learned counsel for the petitioners that private respondents are demanding the hand of minor, namely, baby Husna in lieu of murder of Mst. Mehnaz the wife of petitioner No.1 to marry her with the son of respondent No.4, which even without her consent, is illegal, unlawful and against the norms of natural justice. He further asserted that the official respondents No.7 and 8 are in league with private respondents thus causing harassment to the petitioners. He next contended that the respondents No.1 to 8 are harassing, pressurizing and issuing threats to the petitioners No.1 and 3 to involve them in false cases. He lastly contended that the official respondents are duty bound to provide full protection to the petitioners. In compliance with the order dated 2.6.2017, private respondents No.1 to 6 are present. Mr. Ghulam Mustafa R. Junejo, files vakalatnama on behalf of private respondents which is taken on record. Learned counsel makes categorical statement in Court that neither the private respondents have caused harassment to the petitioners nor they will do so in future. Learned counsel further submits that the private respondents are ready to execute security bond for such purpose.

Learned counsel makes categorical statement in Court that neither the private respondents have caused harassment to the petitioners nor they will do so in future. Learned counsel further submits that the private respondents are ready to execute security bond for such purpose. In view of such statement, let them to execute such security bond in the sum of Rs.25,000/- each before Additional Registrar of this Court. Police officials present in court undertake that no harassment will be caused to the petitioners. In view of the above, since the purpose of filing instant petition has been achieved, therefore, the petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E S Ashfaq
